title: A little addtions
description: This mod adds a ton of new content to Minecraft! Explore multiple new End biomes, discover custom dimensions and structures that fit naturally into the world, and collect powerful new swords that are challenging to obtain. Even more biomes and features are
body:
Check out my CurseForge page:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alittleaddtions

I probably won't be updating the wiki regularly, so if you have any questions, feel free to join the Discord server and ask there.

This mod is designed to improve End generation while adding a variety of new structures and content. Since it's being developed in MCreator, some features are more difficult to implement, and structures may occasionally generate in strange or unexpected ways. Even so, I think it makes for a fun and worthwhile addition to Minecraft.

The mod is compatible with most major world generation mods, including Biomes O' Plenty, Tectonic, Terralith, BetterEnd, BetterNether, Cinderscapes, Nullscape, and many others.

It also adds several custom dimensions. They may not look the best visually, but each one offers its own unique style and gameplay experience.

Currently, the custom Endtree wood set is incomplete. At the moment, it only includes Endwood, Endsticks, and an End Pickaxe, but more recipes and blocks may be added in future updates.

**Note:** All crafting recipes can be viewed using JEI (Just Enough Items).
